meaning: adj.柱形的,筒形的,分纵栏印刷或书写的
examples: The following rule is an example of a columnar rule.
You can also see which of them are scalar and columnar.
An example would be a utility to put material into columnar form.
At its center is a striking columnar glass case that pays homage to the brand's heritage by showcasing vintage Moynats.
The columnar data warehouse enables information access according to workflow needs rather than the hierarchical structure of the organization, increasing employee productivity and effectiveness.
